🏀 MMU BASKETBALL TRYOUTS 2025! 🏀

Think you have what it takes to be part of MMU’s elite basketball team? Don’t miss this chance to prove your skills and secure a spot on the official MMU Basketball Team! 

📅 Date :Friday, 28th November 2025
📍 Venue :MMU Indoor Court 
⏰ Time :8:00 PM

What’s in it for you?
- A shot at representing MMU in major tournaments and leagues! 
- Training with university coach and joining a community of skilled, passionate players 

See you on the court!

Contact us for more information 
011-39835170 (Amir)

🏀 MMUCYBER Basketball Team Tryouts! 🏀

Are you ready to take your basketball skills to the next level? The MMU Basketball Team is holding tryouts and we want YOU to join our team! 💥

Whether you’re a pro or just starting out, this is your chance to showcase your talent, improve your skills, and be part of an incredible team.

📅 Tryout Date: 22th November 2024
📍 Location: MMU Indoor Court
⏰ Time: 8pm

To register or for more info, contact us.
014-3518998 (Marvin)
011-10831182 (Jie Le)

🔥🏀 MMUBC KING OF THE COURT 🏀🔥
🚨 The Ultimate 1-on-1 Basketball Showdown! 🚨

Do you have what it takes to rule the court?
Step up, face off, and prove you’re the true KING of MMUBC! 👑

✅ Date: April 18, 2025
✅ Location: MMU Stadium Indoor Court
✅ Format: 1v1 Battle (Male Participants Only) – Only the strongest will survive!
✅ Prizes: Exclusive rewards for the Winner
✅ Sign Up Here: https://forms.office.com/r/PeXzdqSPAe

💥 Limited slots available – Register now!
💥 Registration Deadline – 15th April 2025 (11.59pm)

🎯🏀 BONUS CHALLENGE: 3-POINT SHOOTOUT! 🏀🎯
Are you the Sharpshooter of MMUBC? Show off your range in the 3-Point Contest and Win Exclusive Prize.
📍 Sign up at the event! Only participant can join this challenge!

Who will be the true KING? Who will dominate? Who will light it up from deep? Let’s find out! 🚀🔥

For any inquires, feel free to contact:
👉🏻 Ho Jie Le - 011-1083 1182
👉🏻 Amir - 011-3983 5170
👉🏻 Marvin - 014-351 8998

Important notice⚠️

Recently, the issue of rim falling off has been faced by our club. One of our basketball rim at MMU Indoor Stadium has been broken and fell off.

1. It is strictly prohibited to hang or pull the basketball rim to try or train to dunk.
.
2. ⁠MMU Cyberjaya Basketball Club do not stop anyone from playing basketball but safety always comes first. 
.
3. ⁠MMU Basketball Club are working on fixing the basketball rim issue so there is only one basketball rim left at MMU Indoor Stadium.
.
Thank you.
#mmubcCBJ

🏀 MMU Basketball Tryouts Recap! 🔥
What an incredible tryout session filled with talent, passion, and determination! 💪 A huge thank you to everyone who gave it their all on the court.

🎉 Congratulations to the players selected for the MMU Basketball Team! 🏆 We’re excited to see this team in action and represent MMU with pride. 💙

Stay tuned for updates on our journey ahead.
